title: Apache Spark Interview Mastery
desc: 9 interactive modules covering RDDs, DataFrames, architecture, performance tuning, Spark UI, optimization, bottleneck detection, streaming, and 170+ real interview questions.

title: Scala Interview Mastery
desc: 8 modules from basics to Spark integration — case classes, pattern matching, collections, concurrency, implicits, and a final battle plan.

title: Data Modeling Interview Mastery
desc: Star schemas, SCDs, fact vs dimension tables, bridge tables, grain, surrogate keys — everything interviewers ask about dimensional modeling.

title: Data Quality Interview Mastery
desc: Quality dimensions, data contracts, anomaly detection, schema drift, quarantine patterns, testing strategies, and real-world failure modes.

title: Data Governance Interview Mastery
desc: RBAC vs ABAC, PII handling, GDPR compliance, data catalogs, retention policies, masking, tokenization, and audit strategies.

title: Cost Optimization Interview Mastery
desc: Partitioning, shuffle reduction, small files problem, backfill estimation, FinOps metrics, join optimization, and cluster management.
